products.name: Beetroot Lip Balm
products.description: Our bestselling Beetroot Lip Balm is made with pure natural beetroot extract and nourishing plant butters. It gives your lips a beautiful natural pink tint while deeply moisturising and healing dry, chapped lips. Free from harmful chemicals — 100% safe for daily use.
products.ingredients: Beetroot Extract, Beeswax, Shea Butter, Coconut Oil, Vitamin E, Sweet Almond Oil, Castor Oil
products.howToUse: Gently apply on lips whenever needed. Use morning and night for best results. Safe for children above 3 years.

products.name: Papaya Face Gel
products.description: Rich in natural papaya enzymes, this face gel gently exfoliates dead skin cells, brightens your complexion and reduces dark spots. Formulated with 100% natural ingredients from Kerala's rich botanical heritage, this face gel gives you glowing, youthful skin.
products.ingredients: Papaya Extract, Aloe Vera Gel, Hyaluronic Acid, Green Tea Extract, Neem Oil, Rose Water, Glycerin
products.howToUse: Apply a thin layer on clean face and neck. Leave for 15-20 minutes, then rinse with water. Use 3 times a week.

products.name: Neem & Tulsi Face Wash
products.description: A gentle yet powerful face wash infused with Kerala neem and holy tulsi. This Ayurvedic formulation deeply cleanses pores, fights acne-causing bacteria, and leaves your skin feeling fresh and purified. Perfect for oily and acne-prone skin.
products.ingredients: Neem Leaf Extract, Tulsi Extract, Aloe Vera, Tea Tree Oil, Glycerin, Rose Water, Vitamin C
products.howToUse: Wet face, apply a small amount, massage gently in circular motions for 1 minute. Rinse thoroughly. Use twice daily.

products.name: Pure Rose Water Toner
products.description: Distilled from handpicked Kerala roses, our Rose Water Toner is a multipurpose skin elixir. It tones, hydrates and refreshes skin instantly. Use as a toner, setting spray, or to soothe irritated skin. No added preservatives or chemicals.
products.ingredients: 100% Pure Rose Distillate (Rosa Damascena)
products.howToUse: Spritz on face after cleansing or anytime for refreshment. Can also be applied with cotton pad. Use as makeup setting spray.

products.name: Aloe Vera Brightening Face Wash
products.description: Enriched with pure Aloe Vera gel from organically grown plants in Kerala, this brightening face wash gently cleanses while moisturising your skin. Perfect for dry and sensitive skin types that need gentle yet effective cleansing.
products.ingredients: Aloe Vera Gel (99%), Turmeric Extract, Vitamin C, Glycerin, Coconut Surfactant, Lavender Oil
products.howToUse: Apply on wet face, lather gently, leave for 30 seconds, rinse thoroughly. Use morning and evening.

products.name: Herbal Hair Growth Oil
products.description: Our most powerful hair oil, blended with 12 traditional Ayurvedic herbs from Kerala. This time-tested formula promotes healthy hair growth, reduces hair fall, strengthens hair roots and conditions your scalp. Used by generations of Kerala women for long, lustrous hair.
products.ingredients: Coconut Oil, Castor Oil, Amla, Bhringraj, Brahmi, Neem, Curry Leaves, Hibiscus, Fenugreek, Black Seed, Rosemary, Vitamin E
products.howToUse: Warm slightly, apply from roots to tips. Massage scalp for 10 minutes. Leave for at least 2 hours or overnight. Wash with shampoo. Use twice a week.

products.name: Carrot Glow Face & Body Oil
products.description: Cold-pressed carrot seed oil rich in beta-carotene and antioxidants. This luxurious oil brightens skin, fades scars, protects from UV damage, and gives you a radiant natural glow. Made with pure Kerala-sourced carrots.
products.ingredients: Carrot Seed Oil (Cold-Pressed), Sweet Almond Oil, Jojoba Oil, Vitamin E, Rosehip Oil
products.howToUse: Apply a few drops on face and body after bathing. Massage gently until absorbed. Use daily for glowing skin.

products.name: Pure Neem Oil
products.description: 100% pure cold-pressed neem oil extracted from Kerala neem seeds. A powerful antibacterial and antifungal oil that treats acne, psoriasis, eczema, and various skin conditions. Also excellent for scalp treatment and plant care.
products.ingredients: 100% Pure Cold-Pressed Neem Oil (Azadirachta Indica)
products.howToUse: Mix 5-10 drops with carrier oil for face/hair use. For scalp: mix with coconut oil, apply, leave 30 mins, wash. For skin conditions: apply diluted directly on affected area.

products.name: Pure Aloe Vera Oil
products.description: Aloe vera infused in a nourishing oil base, capturing all the healing benefits of fresh aloe in a convenient oil form. Perfect for sunburn relief, skin healing, hair conditioning, and everyday moisturising.
products.ingredients: Fresh Aloe Vera Gel, Coconut Oil, Vitamin E, Jojoba Oil
products.howToUse: Apply on face, body or hair as needed. Ideal for sunburn — apply generously and let absorb. Can be used as a massage oil.

products.name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil
products.description: Premium extra virgin olive oil for skin and hair care. Rich in vitamin E, antioxidants, and healthy fatty acids. This skin-grade olive oil deeply moisturises, softens skin, strengthens hair and can even be used for oil cleansing.
products.ingredients: 100% Pure Extra Virgin Olive Oil (Olea Europaea)
products.howToUse: Apply on face as a night moisturiser. Use as hair mask — apply on hair, cover with shower cap, leave 30 mins, wash. Can be used as body oil.

products.name: Rosemary Growth Water
products.description: Rosemary water has gone viral for good reason — it stimulates hair follicles and promotes remarkable hair growth. Our rosemary water is distilled fresh with Kerala rosemary and is free from any additives. Spray directly on scalp for best results.
products.ingredients: Distilled Rosemary Water (Rosmarinus Officinalis), Rosemary Essential Oil
products.howToUse: Spray directly on scalp, massage gently. Leave in — no rinsing needed. Use daily for best results. Can also be mixed with hair oil.

products.name: Multani Mitti (Fuller's Earth)
products.description: Premium quality Multani Mitti sourced from the finest deposits. This clay deeply cleanses pores, controls excess oil, removes tan, and gives you a natural glow. A complete Ayurvedic facial treatment in one powder.
products.ingredients: Pure Multani Mitti (Fuller's Earth / Calcium Bentonite Clay)
products.howToUse: Mix 2 tbsp with rose water or plain water to form a paste. Apply on face, leave 15-20 minutes, rinse with cool water. Use once or twice a week.

products.name: Medicated Indigo Powder
products.description: 100% pure Indigo Powder (Indigofera Tinctoria) for natural hair colouring. When used with henna, it gives a beautiful black to dark brown colour. Chemical-free, safe for long-term use, and conditions hair while colouring. Loved by hundreds of customers on Amazon.
products.ingredients: 100% Pure Indigofera Tinctoria Leaf Powder
products.howToUse: Step 1: Apply henna and leave 2-4 hours. Step 2: Mix indigo with water (no metallic bowl), apply over henna. Leave 1-2 hours. Rinse without shampoo. Result: black/dark brown.

products.name: Pure Henna Powder
products.description: Finest quality natural henna powder (Lawsonia Inermis) sourced from Rajasthan's best henna farms. Triple-sifted for smooth application. Perfect for hair colouring (gives beautiful reddish-brown), mehndi designs, and conditioning hair naturally.
products.ingredients: 100% Pure Lawsonia Inermis Leaf Powder
products.howToUse: For hair: mix with warm water to thick paste, apply root to tip, leave 2-4 hours, rinse. For mehndi: mix with lemon juice, eucalyptus oil, leave overnight for dark colour.

products.name: Red Nail Cone Henna
products.description: Ready-to-use natural henna cone for nails and body art. Our red nail henna gives an intense orange-red colour perfect for traditional Kerala nail colouring. No chemicals added — pure henna in convenient cone form.
products.ingredients: Henna Powder, Lemon Juice, Essential Oils, Natural Terpenol
products.howToUse: Cut cone tip, apply henna on nails or skin, leave to dry (2-3 hours minimum), the longer you leave the deeper the colour. Do not wash for 6-8 hours after removal.

products.name: Herbal Kajal
products.description: Traditional Kerala-style herbal kajal made using the ancient lamp-black method infused with castor oil, ghee, and cooling herbs. Protects eyes from infections, improves eyesight, and gives beautiful deep-black eyes. Safe for babies (6 months+) and all ages.
products.ingredients: Lamp Black (Carbon), Castor Oil, Pure Ghee, Camphor, Triphala, Almond Oil
products.howToUse: Apply using the included stick/finger on the inner rim of the eye. Apply daily for eye protection and enhancement. For babies: apply on sole of foot or forehead.

products.name: Turmeric & Sandalwood Soap
products.description: Handcrafted in Kerala with pure turmeric and sandalwood, this luxurious soap brightens skin, fights bacteria, and leaves behind a divine fragrance. Cold-process method preserves all natural glycerin for maximum moisturisation.
products.ingredients: Coconut Oil, Palm Oil, Castor Oil, Turmeric Extract, Sandalwood Powder, Vitamin E, Kaolin Clay
products.howToUse: Use as regular soap. Lather well, cleanse and rinse. For face: avoid eye area. For best results, use daily.

products.name: Activated Charcoal Detox Soap
products.description: Detox your skin with our activated charcoal soap. This deep-cleansing soap draws out toxins, impurities and pollution from deep within pores. With added tea tree oil for antibacterial action, it's perfect for acne-prone and oily skin.
products.ingredients: Activated Charcoal, Tea Tree Oil, Coconut Oil, Shea Butter, Bentonite Clay, Peppermint Oil
products.howToUse: Wet face or body, lather with soap, massage gently, leave 60 seconds, rinse well. Use daily on body, 2-3 times per week on face.

products.name: Natural Glycerin Soap
products.description: Pure transparent glycerin soap with no SLS, parabens or artificial fragrances. Gentle enough for daily use, even for sensitive skin and children. Our bestselling body soap that cleanses without stripping natural oils.
products.ingredients: Glycerin, Coconut Oil, Shea Butter, Aloe Vera Extract, Natural Fragrance
products.howToUse: Use daily for bathing. Safe for face and body. Suitable for all ages including children above 3 years.

products.name: Anti-Dandruff Herbal Shampoo
products.description: Formulated with traditional Kerala herbs — neem, tea tree, and bhringraj — this shampoo effectively treats dandruff at its root. Controls itching, flaking, and seborrheic dermatitis. Leaves hair feeling clean, fresh, and dandruff-free from the very first wash.
products.ingredients: Neem Extract, Tea Tree Oil, Bhringraj, Salicylic Acid (natural), Aloe Vera, Coconut Surfactant
products.howToUse: Wet hair, apply shampoo, massage scalp for 2 minutes, leave for 1 minute, rinse thoroughly. Use 2-3 times per week.

products.name: Herbal Moisturising Shampoo
products.description: A gentle daily-use shampoo enriched with natural herbs, aloe vera, and coconut extract. Cleanses hair without stripping natural oils, adds shine, and makes hair manageable. Suitable for all hair types including coloured and chemically treated hair.
products.ingredients: Aloe Vera, Coconut Milk, Hibiscus Extract, Fenugreek, Argan Oil, Natural Fragrance
products.howToUse: Apply on wet hair, lather, massage gently, rinse. Use 2-3 times per week for normal hair, daily for oily hair. Follow with conditioner for dry hair.

products.name: Papaya Brightening Face Pack
products.description: A luxurious face pack powered by papaya enzymes, turmeric, and kaolin clay. This pack deeply cleanses, brightens, and removes tan in one application. Regular use visibly reduces pigmentation and gives you a Kerala actress-like glow.
products.ingredients: Papaya Powder, Kaolin Clay, Turmeric, Sandalwood Powder, Rose Hip, Vitamin C, Multani Mitti
products.howToUse: Mix 2 tbsp with rose water or plain water. Apply evenly on face & neck. Leave 20 minutes. Rinse with cool water. Use twice a week.

products.name: Rose Fragrance (Soap Perfume)
products.description: Premium grade rose fragrance oil perfect for soap making, candles, diffusers, and home fragrance. Concentrated formula — a little goes a long way. Our most popular fragrance capturing the essence of Kerala's finest roses.
products.ingredients: Rose Fragrance Compounds, Dipropylene Glycol (DPG), Rose Essential Oil
products.howToUse: For soap: use at 3-5% of total oil weight. For candles: use at 6-10%. For diffusers: add 5-10 drops. For room spray: dilute in water/alcohol.

products.name: Jasmine Fragrance (Soap Perfume)
products.description: Capture the intoxicating scent of Kerala's famous jasmine (Jasminum sambac) in this premium fragrance oil. Perfect for soap making, candles, and home fragrance. This fragrance transports you to a Kerala jasmine garden at dusk.
products.ingredients: Jasmine Fragrance Compounds, Dipropylene Glycol, Jasmine Absolute Oil
products.howToUse: For soap: use at 3-5% of total oil weight. For candles: 6-10%. Dilute in carrier for personal fragrance use.

products.name: Silicone Soap Mold (6 Cavity)
products.description: Professional grade flexible silicone soap mold with 6 cavities. Makes perfectly shaped artisan soaps every time. Easy to unmold, dishwasher safe, and extremely durable. Perfect for beginners and professional soap makers alike.
products.ingredients: Food-grade silicone
products.howToUse: Pour soap batter into mold, tap to remove bubbles. Allow to harden 24-48 hours. Flex mold to unmold. Cure soap for 4-6 weeks.

products.name: Handcrafted Wooden Bangle
products.description: Beautiful handcrafted wooden bangle made from sustainable Kerala wood with intricate traditional Kerala carving designs. Perfect for daily wear or special occasions. Each piece is unique and carefully handcrafted by artisans.
products.ingredients: Sustainable Kerala Wood, Natural Wood Polish
products.howToUse: Wear as a traditional bangle or ornament. Hand wash gently. Store in a dry place.
